abilities.description: This kin-blade does not use a health meter, but it is as vulnerable to destruction or loss as any object. It is a sentient weapon imbued with an AI or spirit (mark which one). When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} while wielding it, add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} by listening to your kin-blade...

  • AI: Add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit.
  • Spirit: Reroll a die, but @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} with your kin-blade...

  • AI: Add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit.
  • Spirit: Mark progress on a hit, but @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).
